special_mechanics.name: Magic Carpet Flight
special_mechanics.description: Certain levels allow the player to possess a flying magic carpet for traversal

special_mechanics.name: Levitation Spell
special_mechanics.description: Castable levitation spell available on certain levels

special_mechanics.name: Barrel Paddling
special_mechanics.description: Player can paddle a floating barrel on water

special_mechanics.name: Combat Mode
special_mechanics.description: Initiated upon touching enemies; player can dodge, swing, and stab with sword

special_mechanics.name: Fireball Spell
special_mechanics.description: Can be freely used on isometric field to dispatch enemies (not in combat mode)

tier_notes: Tier 2 - No precise physics parameters documented for Genesis version. Available sources contain only gameplay descriptions and reception information. Movement mechanics are inferred from gameplay descriptions (dodge, sword swing/stab, various traversal modes) but specific values like speed, acceleration, or gravity are not quantified. Game is isometric action-adventure with heavy reliance on special abilities rather than base movement physics.
